narrative:
Precinct Loudon South (precinct in Seneca County) has 418 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.4 percentage points.
